name: Spicy Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken Breast Halves, Skinless & Boneless, Cut Into Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onions, ginger, garlic, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper in 1/4 cup peanut oil until the onions are soft.
2. Add chicken strips and cook until the chicken turns white.
3. Stir in tomato sauce and buttermilk. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine chicken stock, rice, remaining peanut oil, salt, turmeric, and cardamom. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until the stock is absorbed (about 15 minutes).
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Spoon half of the cooked rice into a greased 9" x 12" casserole dish with a tight-fitting lid.
8. Layer chicken, remaining rice, and remaining chicken on top.
9. Sprinkle coconut flakes over the top.
10. Cover and bake for about 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
11. Serve with sliced bananas and chutney.
